markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content review process and select new blog topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Refined:** The content review process will be updated to handle the high technical depth of articles, which requires specific subject matter expert (SME) input.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**Competitor Strategy:** The content workflow will be adjusted to allow discussion of competing *technologies* (e.g., Wasm, containers) while still excluding direct company competitors (e.g., E2B, Modal).](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** The Looker dashboard is live, pulling data from Google Search Console (GSC). GrowthX will now integrate PostHog data, as GA4 is not an option due to legal constraints.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**New Topics Selected:** Five new blog topics were chosen, mixing technical and less technical subjects to balance review load.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Blaxel's internal review process is a bottleneck for publishing technical articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Cause:** Technical depth requires specific SMEs (developers), who are often unavailable due to other priorities like product releases.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new process will be implemented to improve review efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Airtable Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
          - [Blaxel will flag technical articles in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
          - [GrowthX will add an "SME Review" status.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
          - [Blaxel will tag GrowthX in comments to request status changes, as their access is read-only.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Content Mix:** Future article batches will mix technical and less technical topics to balance the review load.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

### Competitor & Technology Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The content workflow's "remove competitors" instruction overcorrected, causing the AI to omit relevant competing *technologies* like Wasm.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [**Solution:** The workflow will be updated to distinguish between direct company competitors and competing technologies.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**Direct Competitors (Companies):** Continue to exclude.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**Competing Technologies (Concepts):** Allow for comparative discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This is crucial for technical credibility and SEO, as it positions Blaxel's sandboxing technology (MicroVMs) as a superior alternative in relevant search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Performance Tracking & Reporting

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard is live, pulling data from GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [**Initial Data:** One new post has 159 impressions with an average position of 18.6.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Goal:** Achieve an average position of 1-10 for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [**PostHog Integration:** GrowthX will integrate PostHog data, as GA4 is not an option due to Blaxel's legal constraints.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will create a PostHog view to track blog performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Support:** Blaxel will provide engineering support if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### New Blog Topics

  - [Five new blog topics were selected to create a balanced review load:](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
    1.  [Sandbox for AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
    2.  [MCP vs. API](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
    3.  [Modal vs. E2B (competitive analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
    4.  [How to build a sandbox with GPU support](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
    5.  [Serverless sandboxing](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Unpublish the unreviewed blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Update the content workflow to distinguish between company and technology competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [Grant Natalie schema markup permissions in Strapi.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Create a PostHog view for blog performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Begin drafting the five new blog topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [Share the Slack discussion with the Webflow VP of Engineering as a potential topic.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [Provide engineering support for PostHog integration if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xxJbX8viky8CXPSGK6K4cTzxWNnT4YYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
